mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (user_name, password, phone, address, role, status) VALUES (#{userName}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id

SELECT * FROM t_user
AND deleted = 0
AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET user_name = #{userName}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, role = #{role}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET phone = #{phone}, address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE role = #{role} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
